field.name: stage_id
field.invisible: ((not active and not employee_id) or is_pool_applicant) or x_psm_0205_recruitment_type == 'office'

field.name: stage_id
field.invisible: ((not active and not employee_id) or is_pool_applicant) or x_psm_0205_recruitment_type != 'office'

div.invisible: x_psm_0205_recruitment_type != 'office' or not x_psm_0205_can_schedule_next_round or not x_psm_0205_next_round_meeting_missing

xpath.div: Chưa có meeting cho vòng phỏng vấn kế tiếp. Vui lòng tạo lịch phỏng vấn (meeting slots)

xpath.attribute: recruitment_type == 'store' or recruitment_type == 'office' or not active or not survey_id
